issues.description: Condition uses HasCardOnBoard with name 'Land of Wano', but should check if Leader has {Land of Wano} type. Correct condition type is LeaderHasType with value 'Land of Wano'.
Missing second condition: 'opponent has 3 or more Life cards'. Current DSL only checks Leader type. Should use AND logic with TrashCount or equivalent life check condition.
Action should specify 'up to 1' in the target definition. Current target lacks explicit quantity limit (maxCount should be 1).
